# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-28 | **更新时间**: 07:41 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[06:18]` **🏛️监管 | 美国 FDA 批准 DECNUPAZTM（pivekimab sunirine-pvzy）用于治疗母细胞性浆细胞样树突状细胞肿瘤成人患者，这是一种治疗选择有限的极其罕见和侵袭性血癌**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *U.S. FDA Approves DECNUPAZTM (pivekimab sunirine-pvzy) for Treatment of Adult Patients with Blastic Plasmacytoid Dendritic Cell Neoplasm, an Ultra-Rare and Aggressive Blood Cancer With Limited Treatment Options* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **埃博拉病毒和汉坦病毒爆发暴露了特定毒株覆盖范围的局限性，MindWalk Holdings 通过 HYFT® 技术部署流行病应对平台**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *MindWalk Holdings Deploys Pandemic Response Platform via HYFT® Technology as Ebola and Hantavirus Outbreaks Expose the Limits of Strain-Specific Coverage* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[14:30]` **Precision BioSciences 在 2026 年欧洲肝脏研究协会大会上公布了来自 ELIMINATE-B 研究的新的最新 PBGENE-HBV 临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Precision BioSciences Announces New and Late-Breaking PBGENE-HBV Clinical Data from the ELIMINATE-B Study at European Association for the Study of the Liver Congress 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
